name: BMMS
description: Battery monitoring and management system for tracking voltage, temperature, and battery health signals.
overview: A real-time embedded monitoring project prepared as a future build guide. The landing page structure is ready for schematics, firmware, charts, test notes, and downloadable resources as the project grows.
steps: Read voltage and temperature values from the embedded board.
Validate the readings against a known meter.
Document thresholds, alerts, and dashboard behavior.
Publish downloadable firmware and support files.
